baselineName: SOTA: risk parity + relative momentum 126/252d regime

warnings: EWH has 2 stale close-price runs of at least 3 observations.
EWJ has 1 stale close-price runs of at least 3 observations.

definition.name: SOTA: risk parity + relative momentum 126/252d regime
definition.description: Monthly risk parity with a regime-gated cross-sectional relative momentum tilt. This is the current research hurdle for new candidate strategies.

layers.title: Market data
layers.detail: Adjusted ETF closes, volumes, and USD/CNH FX for SPY, VGK, EWJ, EWH, EWY.

layers.title: Monthly rebalance
layers.detail: Recompute targets on the first available trading day of each month.

layers.title: Risk parity beta
layers.detail: 63-bar realized volatility, inverse-vol weights, 45% max weight, 2% cash reserve.

layers.title: Relative momentum overlay
layers.detail: Score = 45% 126d momentum + 55% 252d momentum; regime drawdown trigger -0.08, vol-ratio trigger 1.35; tilt 0.12 calm / 0.12 risk; cap active weight 0.07.

layers.title: Final target weights
layers.detail: Normalize portfolio weights and feed the daily backtest execution engine.

baseline.layerDiagram:
flowchart LR L1["Market data
Adjusted ETF closes, volumes, and USD/CNH FX for SPY, VGK, EWJ, EWH, EWY."] L2["Monthly rebalance
Recompute targets on the first available trading day of each month."] L1 --> L2 L3["Risk parity beta
63-bar realized volatility, inverse-vol weights, 45% max weight, 2% cash reserve."] L2 --> L3 L4["Relative momentum overlay
Score = 45% 126d momentum + 55% 252d momentum; regime drawdown trigger -0.08, vol-ratio trigger 1.35; tilt 0.12 calm / 0.12 risk; cap active weight 0.07."] L3 --> L4 L5["Final target weights
Normalize portfolio weights and feed the daily backtest execution engine."] L4 --> L5
baseline.decisionTree:
flowchart TD
  A(["Risk-parity targets"]) --> B{"Enough 126d and 252d history for the basket?"}
  B -- "No" --> C["Keep risk-parity targets"]
  B -- "Yes" --> D["Score each ETF = 45% medium momentum + 55% long momentum"]
  D --> E{"Basket drawdown <= -0.08 or vol-ratio >= 1.35?"}
  E -- "Yes" --> F["Use risk tilt 0.12"]
  E -- "No" --> G["Use calm tilt 0.12"]
  F --> H["Rank ETFs by score"]
  G --> H
  H --> I["Multiply base weight by 1 + tilt * rank score"]
  I --> J["Cap active delta at +/-0.07 per ETF"]
  J --> K["Rescale to preserve original invested weight"]
  K --> L(["Final SOTA/research targets"])
